_README: Copy to beamlog.json (gitignored) and edit. Each key is optional; env vars BEAMLOG_DB / BEAMLOG_SPEC_LOG / BEAMLOG_DATA_ROOT / BEAMLOG_LOG_GLOB override these. Use placeholder paths here; put real paths only in your local beamlog.json.
_db: Path to the SQLite database. If omitted, defaults to <data_root>/beamlog.db so the corpus lives beside the data.
_spec_log: Option A: one exact SPEC session log to read.
_data_root: Option B (instead of spec_log): a base folder to search. The newest matching file is used, so it follows the current experiment automatically.
_log_glob: Glob under data_root (recursive). Default '**/*.log'. Files containing 'scanlist' are ignored.
_frames: Optional area-detector frame capture (needs the 'frames' extra: pip install .[frames]). Unset frame_pv -> feature off; everything else works as before.
_frame_pv: EPICS areaDetector PVA Image channel to capture from (the NDPluginPva output), e.g. '13SIM1:Pva1:Image'. Use the literal 'synthetic' to test the whole pipeline without pvapy or a beamline.
_frames_dir: Where cached frames live. Default: a 'beamlog_frames' dir beside the db (in the Data folder, not the repo).
_frame_timeout: Seconds to wait for a PV get (default 1.0). Kept short so a down detector never stalls tail.
_frame_filter: Optional regex; only commands matching it are captured. Default unset = capture on every completed command. Example below: only scan/count-like commands.
_frame_ttl_hours: Pending (un-kept) frames older than this are pruned (default 48).
_frame_cache_max_mb: Cap on the frames dir; over budget, oldest pending frames are evicted (default 2048).
